chain.thought: Explanation: From the sub-table, the largest capacity is 81,338 at Stade de France in Paris (Île-de-France). However, the condition “while also having no venues” is contradictory: any location with the largest-capacity venue necessarily has at least one venue. The table only lists locations that have venues, so no location satisfies both conditions.
